name: Eggplant Parmigiana/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the eggplants into 1/2 inch slices.
2. Place the slices in a bowl in layers, sprinkling each layer with salt. Let stand for 30 minutes to drain excess water, then dry on paper towels.
3. In a separate bowl, mix eggs with water and flour.
4. Dip the eggplant slices in the egg mixture, allowing them to drain slightly.
5. Heat olive oil in a pan. Quickly sauté a few slices until golden brown.
6. Combine seasoned bread crumbs with Parmesan cheese.
7. In a removable liner, layer one-fourth of the eggplant, followed by one-fourth of the crumbs, one-fourth of the marinara sauce, and one-fourth of the mozzarella cheese. Repeat this process three more times to make four layers of eggplant, crumbs, sauce, and mozzarella cheese.
8. Place the liner in the base.
9. Cover and cook on low for 4-5 hours or auto-cook for 3 hours.
